name: Generate AI clips with HTTP / REST API and Google Drive for Publishing

parameters.content:
### Hourly Schedule

Starts the workflow on a timer — every 4 h. No input data; downstream nodes fetch what they need.

Next: Download from Google Drive

### Download from Google Drive

googleDrive — `download` operation against the connected account.

Next: Parse XLSX Contents

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2

### Parse XLSX Contents

Parses the incoming XLSX binary into JSON items.

Next: Clean & Reshape Rows

### Clean & Reshape Rows

Custom JavaScript: Normalize incoming asset records to a stable schema

Next: Load Rows into Google Sheets

### Load Rows into Google Sheets

googleSheets — `appendOrUpdate` operation against the connected account.

Next: Repack as XLSX

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

nodes.name: Note: Load Rows into Google Sheets

parameters.content:
### Repack as XLSX

Serializes items to a XLSX binary file.

Next: Archive Processed File (Google Drive)

### Archive Processed File (Google Drive)

googleDrive — `upload` operation against the connected account.

Next: Cap Batch Volume

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2

### Cap Batch Volume

Caps the stream at 50 items to protect downstream quotas.

Next: Align Field Names

### Align Field Names

Normalizes field names so every source feeds the same downstream schema.

# Generate AI clips with HTTP / REST API and Google Drive for Publishing

**Pattern:** Video Production · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Generate AI clips with HTTP / REST API and Google Drive for Publishing. It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual publishing is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Hourly Schedule → Download from Google Drive → Parse XLSX Contents → Clean & Reshape Rows → Load Rows into Google Sheets → Repack as XLSX → Archive Processed File (Google Drive) → …

## Use it for
- Teams that want to video production without manual effort
- Anyone automating publishing in content creation
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Scales without extra headcount
- Standardizes the process every time
- Saves hours of manual work each week

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2; Google OAuth2 / service account.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your publishing process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
